title: Senior Teacher - Ratna Sagar Holdings Services - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Ratna Sagar Holdings Services - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ratna Sagar Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Ratna Sagar Holdings Services:
Ratna Sagar Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ratna Sagar Holdings Services!
